title: British Oat Curry
description: A hearty and flavorful British-inspired curry made with oats and a blend of spices. Perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cumin and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the oats and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid and the mixture has thickened.
Serve the curry over jasmine rice, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Note: You can also add protein like chicken or tofu to make this a more substantial meal.
